codeReview.summary: The FileLockManager implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. It provides logical file locks with conflict detection and lock release capabilities. The implementation uses tokio RwLock for thread-safety, tracks locks by file path with task_id and agent_id, and includes comprehensive test coverage (28 tests) including concurrent access scenarios.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature is properly exported from the orchestrator crate via lib.rs, following the established pattern for other modules (file_locks module declaration + pub use exports). No convention gaps identified.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: crates/swell-orchestrator/src/lib.rs:20 adds 'pub mod file_locks;' and lines 64-66 export FileLock, FileLockError, FileLockManager, LockAcquisitionResult, LockEvent, LockEventType, LockStats

summary: Feature orch-file-locks passes review. The FileLockManager provides logical file locks to prevent concurrent edits to the same file across agents. All three expected behaviors are implemented: (1) Logical lock per file path using HashMap keyed by path string, (2) Conflict detection returning LockAcquisitionResult::Conflict when another task holds the lock, (3) Lock release on completion via release() and release_all_for_task() methods. Thread-safe implementation using tokio RwLock. All 28 unit tests pass. cargo build --workspace succeeds.
